steps.title: Read the group label
steps.content: The underlined phrase says the family of plants is 'known collectively as the silversword alliance.' The word 'collectively' shows that the phrase gives a name for the whole related group, not for one species alone.

steps.title: Reject narrower functions
steps.content: Choice A says the phrase lists species, but it gives a group name. Choice B treats it as the common name of Dubautia waialealae, and Choice C says it explains uniqueness; neither matches the phrase's role. The answer is D.
